message:
bench(timer_wheel): add comparison benchmarks against BTreeMap, BinaryHeap, and Vec

Expand the timer wheel benchmark suite from 5 basic benchmarks to a
comprehensive comparison framework (681 new lines):

- Add BTreeMap<u64, Vec<Waker>>, BinaryHeap<(Reverse<u64>, Waker)>,
  and Vec<(u64, Waker)> as alternative timer implementations to
  benchmark against the hierarchical timing wheel
- Benchmark operations: insert, cancel, tick-no-expiry, tick-with-
  expiry, and large-scale (10K timers) for each data structure
- Add coalescing overhead measurements specific to the timing wheel
- Include documented performance targets (insert < 100ns, cancel
  < 50ns, tick-no-expiry < 50ns) and summary of expected results
  in module doc comments
- All comparison benchmarks use identical workloads for fair
  head-to-head comparison

This provides empirical evidence for the O(1) insert/cancel claims
of the hierarchical timing wheel versus the O(log n) alternatives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
